scripts.test: pnpm test:root && pnpm test:web && pnpm test:cli
scripts.test:e2e:fullstack: docker compose -f tests/e2e/docker-compose.yml run --build --rm test-runner; docker compose -f tests/e2e/docker-compose.yml down -v
scripts.lint:root: biome check convex docs shared skills tests scripts web *.json *.ts && tsc --noEmit && bash scripts/validate-shared.sh
scripts.lint: pnpm lint:root && pnpm lint:web && pnpm lint:cli
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --fix convex docs shared skills tests scripts web *.json *.ts
scripts.format: biome format --write convex docs shared skills tests scripts web *.json *.ts
scripts.check: pnpm build && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm knip
